reviews.comment:
Impecable! Tiene frutas a la vista muy limpio en general un salón amplio y espacioso cómodos sillones y muy buena comida muy rico todo

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable! It has fruit on display, is very clean overall, the room is spacious and spacious, comfortable chairs, and very good food. Everything is delicious.

reviews.comment:
Rápidos y atentos para atender, completa, con servicios limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Fast and attentive to service, complete, with clean services.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKd2VlcFRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar, un poco desorganizado en cuanto a cómo comprar.. estamos acostumbrados a pagar antes de consumir, y en este caso es al revés jajaja poca gente lo sabía, es un poco confuso.. pero lo demás excelente!

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, a little disorganized in terms of how to buy things... we're used to paying before consuming, and in this case it's the other way around haha, few people knew that, it's a bit confusing... but otherwise excellent!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdnZIaUJ3EAE
